sections.title: Overview
sections.content:
The **Smartsheet connector** integrates with Smartsheet via the Smartsheet REST API 2.0. It enables Shielva to sync sheets, rows, workspaces, reports, and folders — making your work management data searchable and actionable in the Shielva knowledge base.

This connector uses API token authentication (`Authorization: Bearer {token}`), granting read access to all sheets, workspaces, and reports accessible to the token owner.

**Key capabilities:**
- List all sheets (page-based pagination, 100 per page)
- Fetch a single sheet with columns and rows
- List all rows on a sheet (page-based pagination, 500 per page)
- List all workspaces (includeAll=true)
- List all reports (paginated)
- List top-level folders
- Full sync: sheets → rows + workspaces + reports → normalized ConnectorDocuments
- Stable document IDs via SHA-256("sheet:"|"row:"|"workspace:"|"report:" + id)[:16] for deduplication

children.title: Connector Type
children.content: `smartsheet` — registered in ACP as **Smartsheet**.

children.title: Provider
children.content: Smartsheet (REST API 2.0 — `https://api.smartsheet.com/2.0/`)

children.title: Supported Operations
children.content:
| Operation | Description |
|-----------|-------------|
| `install()` | Validates api_token presence; returns HEALTHY/CONNECTED or OFFLINE/MISSING_CREDENTIALS |
| `health_check()` | Calls GET /users/me to verify token; returns authenticated user display name |
| `sync()` | Lists all sheets, fetches all rows per sheet, plus workspaces and reports; normalizes to ConnectorDocuments |
| `list_sheets(**kwargs)` | Page-based sheet list (totalPages + pageNumber pagination) |
| `list_rows(sheet_id, **kwargs)` | Page-based row list for a given sheet |
| `list_workspaces()` | All workspaces via includeAll=true |
| `list_reports()` | Paginated report list |
| `get_sheet(sheet_id)` | Single sheet with columns and rows |

sections.title: Authentication
sections.content: The connector uses **API token authentication** — a long-lived token tied to the Smartsheet user account.

children.title: Auth Type
children.content: `api_key` — obtain the token from **Account → Apps & Integrations → API Access → Generate new access token**.

children.title: Install Fields
children.content:
| Field | Key | Type | Required | Description |
|-------|-----|------|----------|-------------|
| API Token | `api_token` | password | Yes | Smartsheet API access token from Account → Apps & Integrations → API Access |

children.title: Auth Headers
children.content:
Every request to `https://api.smartsheet.com/2.0/` includes:

```
Authorization: Bearer {api_token}
Content-Type: application/json
```

Note: Smartsheet **requires** the `Bearer` prefix — unlike some other API-key providers that use the raw token.

children.title: Token Security
children.content: Smartsheet API tokens do not expire unless manually deleted. Shielva stores the token AES-256-GCM encrypted at rest via the vault. The token can be deleted and regenerated at any time from Account → Apps & Integrations → API Access.

sections.title: Configuration
sections.content: All configuration is stored in the connector's `config` dict (encrypted at rest by Shielva vault).

children.title: Config Keys
children.content:
| Key | Description | Required |
|-----|-------------|----------|
| `api_token` | Smartsheet API access token | Yes |

sections.title: Pagination
sections.content: The Smartsheet REST API 2.0 uses **page-based pagination** for list endpoints.

children.title: Sheets Pagination
children.content: GET /sheets returns `totalPages` and `pageNumber` fields. The connector iterates pages until `pageNumber >= totalPages`. Default page size: 100.

children.title: Rows Pagination
children.content: GET /sheets/{id}/rows returns `totalPages` and `pageNumber` fields. Default page size: 500 rows per page.

children.title: Workspaces
children.content: GET /workspaces?includeAll=true — all workspaces returned in a single response (no pagination needed).

children.title: Reports Pagination
children.content: GET /reports returns `totalPages` and `pageNumber`. The connector fetches all pages at 100 per page.

sections.title: Document Normalization
sections.content: Every Smartsheet resource is normalized into a `ConnectorDocument` before ingestion.

children.title: normalize_sheet
children.content:
**Input:** Raw sheet dict from GET /sheets or GET /sheets/{id}.

**Output:** `ConnectorDocument` with:
- `id`: `sha256("sheet:" + str(sheet_id))[:16]`
- `title`: `"Sheet: {name}"`
- `content`: Name, ID, access level, total row count, created/modified, permalink
- `type`: `"smartsheet_sheet"`
- `metadata`: sheet_id, name, permalink, access_level, created_at, modified_at, total_row_count, source

children.title: normalize_row
children.content:
**Input:** Raw row dict + parent sheet_id.

**Output:** `ConnectorDocument` with:
- `id`: `sha256("row:" + str(row_id))[:16]`
- `title`: `"Row {rowNumber} (Sheet {sheet_id})"`
- `content`: Row number, row ID, sheet ID, cell displayValues, created/modified, raw cells JSON
- `type`: `"smartsheet_row"`
- `metadata`: row_id, row_number, sheet_id, cells (raw list), created_at, modified_at, source

children.title: normalize_workspace
children.content:
**Input:** Raw workspace dict from GET /workspaces.

**Output:** `ConnectorDocument` with:
- `id`: `sha256("workspace:" + str(id))[:16]`
- `title`: `"Workspace: {name}"`
- `type`: `"smartsheet_workspace"`
- `metadata`: workspace_id, name, access_level, source

children.title: normalize_report
children.content:
**Input:** Raw report dict from GET /reports.

**Output:** `ConnectorDocument` with:
- `id`: `sha256("report:" + str(id))[:16]`
- `title`: `"Report: {name}"`
- `type`: `"smartsheet_report"`
- `metadata`: report_id, name, access_level, created_at, modified_at, source

sections.title: Error Handling
sections.content: All errors are mapped to typed exceptions in `exceptions.py`.

children.title: Exception Hierarchy
children.content:
```
SmartsheetError (base)
├── SmartsheetAuthError       — HTTP 401/403 (invalid or expired token)
├── SmartsheetNetworkError    — Connection timeout, DNS failure, HTTP 5xx
├── SmartsheetNotFoundError   — HTTP 404 (sheet/resource not found)
└── SmartsheetRateLimitError  — HTTP 429 (rate limit exceeded)
```

children.title: Retry Logic
children.content: `with_retry(fn, max_attempts=3, base_delay=1.0)` — exponential back-off (1s, 2s, 4s). Auth errors are never retried — they require re-installing with a valid token. All other `SmartsheetError` subclasses and generic exceptions are retried up to `max_attempts` times.

children.title: HTTP Error Mapping
children.content:
| HTTP Status | Exception |
|-------------|----------|
| 200, 201 | — (success) |
| 401, 403 | `SmartsheetAuthError` |
| 404 | `SmartsheetNotFoundError` |
| 429 | `SmartsheetRateLimitError` |
| 400–499 | `SmartsheetError` |
| 500+ | `SmartsheetNetworkError` |

sections.title: Sync Behavior
sections.content: The `sync()` method performs a full snapshot sync across all resource types.

children.title: Sync Order
children.content:
1. Fetch all sheets (paginated)
2. For each sheet: normalize sheet → sync, then fetch all rows → normalize each row → sync
3. Fetch all workspaces → normalize each → sync
4. Fetch all reports → normalize each → sync

Failures on individual sheets or rows are counted as `documents_failed` but do not abort the sync. Auth errors abort immediately.

children.title: Sync Status
children.content:
| Status | Condition |
|--------|----------|
| `COMPLETED` | Zero documents_failed |
| `PARTIAL` | At least one document_failed |
| `FAILED` | Top-level exception (auth error, sheets list failure) |

sections.title: API Reference
sections.content: Key Smartsheet REST API 2.0 endpoints used by this connector.

children.title: Endpoints
children.content:
| Method | Endpoint | Purpose |
|--------|----------|---------|
| GET | /users/me | Health check — returns authenticated user |
| GET | /sheets | List all sheets (paginated) |
| GET | /sheets/{id} | Fetch single sheet with columns and rows |
| GET | /sheets/{id}/rows | Fetch rows for a sheet (paginated) |
| GET | /workspaces | List all workspaces (includeAll=true) |
| GET | /reports | List all reports (paginated) |
| GET | /home/folders | List top-level home folders |
